site.name: Coobbi
site.description: Coobbi Tools creates Android utilities for Java apps, file openers, network monitoring, server management and everyday productivity.

apps.name: Jre4Android
apps.title: Jre4Android - Java Runtime & J2ME
apps.shortDescription: Run JAR files, CLASS files, Java Swing GUI apps and J2ME apps directly on Android.
apps.seoDescription: A Java runtime tool for Android that helps you run Java JAR files, CLASS files, command-line Java programs, Swing GUI apps and classic J2ME apps.

tutorials.title: How to Run JAR Files on Android
tutorials.description: Use Jre4Android to run compatible Java JAR apps directly on Android.

tutorials.title: Run Java Swing Apps on Android
tutorials.description: Launch desktop-style Java Swing GUI apps with touch, zoom and virtual mouse controls.

tutorials.title: How to Run .class Files on Android
tutorials.description: Run compiled Java CLASS files from your Android device.

tutorials.title: J2ME Emulator for Android
tutorials.description: Run classic Java ME apps and games on Android.

extraSections.title: Free vs Pro
extraSections.body: The free version is useful for running Java apps on Android. The Pro version adds no ads, custom arguments and Java 25 runtime support.

apps.name: Jre4Android Pro
apps.title: Jre4Android Pro - Java Runtime for Android
apps.shortDescription: No ads, custom args support and Java 25 runtime for running Java apps on Android.
apps.seoDescription: Jre4Android Pro is the premium Java runtime tool for Android, with no ads, custom arguments and modern Java runtime support.

apps.name: Jar File Opener
apps.title: Jar File Opener for Android
apps.shortDescription: Open, inspect, decompile and extract JAR files on Android.
apps.seoDescription: Jar File Opener helps Android users open JAR archives, inspect MANIFEST.MF files, extract contents and view Java class information.

tutorials.title: How to Open JAR Files on Android
tutorials.description: Open, browse and inspect Java JAR archives on Android.

tutorials.title: How to View MANIFEST.MF
tutorials.description: Check Main-Class, Manifest-Version and other JAR metadata.

tutorials.title: Decompile CLASS Files
tutorials.description: Inspect Java class information from Android.

tutorials.title: Extract JAR Files
tutorials.description: Extract JAR package contents directly on Android.

apps.name: APK File Opener
apps.title: APK File Opener for Android
apps.shortDescription: Open APK, XAPK and APKS files, view app details, check permissions and extract package contents.
apps.seoDescription: APK File Opener helps Android users open APK files, view APK details, browse internal contents, check permissions and extract files from APK, XAPK and APKS packages.
features: View app name, package name and version
Inspect DEX files and native libraries

apps.name: DLL File Viewer & EXE Viewer
apps.title: DLL File Viewer & EXE Viewer for Android
apps.shortDescription: Open DLL and EXE files on Android, inspect Windows executable metadata and view package details.
apps.seoDescription: DLL File Viewer & EXE Viewer helps Android users open Windows DLL and EXE files, inspect executable metadata, view headers and understand portable executable file details.
features: Check imports and exports when available
Useful for developers and file analysis

apps.name: Pages File Opener
apps.title: Pages File Opener for Android
apps.shortDescription: Open Apple Pages documents on Android and inspect document package contents.
apps.seoDescription: Pages File Opener helps Android users open Apple Pages documents, view supported content and inspect files from .pages document packages.

apps.name: Ini File Opener
apps.title: Ini File Opener for Android
apps.shortDescription: Open INI configuration files on Android and view sections, keys and values.
apps.seoDescription: Ini File Opener helps Android users open INI configuration files, read sections, inspect key-value settings and manage plain text configuration content.
features: Useful for developers and advanced users

apps.name: DAT File Opener
apps.title: DAT File Opener for Android
apps.shortDescription: Open, view and extract DAT files on Android.
apps.seoDescription: DAT File Opener helps Android users open, view and extract common DAT files with a simple file inspection workflow.

tutorials.title: How to Open DAT Files on Android
tutorials.description: Use DAT File Opener to inspect and extract DAT files from your Android device.

apps.name: OBB File Opener
apps.title: OBB File Opener for Android
apps.shortDescription: Open, browse and extract Android OBB files.
apps.seoDescription: OBB File Opener helps Android users open, browse and extract APK expansion OBB files from games and apps.

tutorials.title: How to Open OBB Files on Android
tutorials.description: Open and browse Android OBB expansion files with OBB File Opener.

apps.name: SO File Viewer
apps.title: SO File Viewer for Android
apps.shortDescription: Open .so files and check Android 16KB page size support.
apps.seoDescription: SO File Viewer helps Android users inspect native .so libraries and check Android 16KB page size compatibility.

tutorials.title: Check Android 16KB Page Size Support
tutorials.description: Use SO File Viewer to inspect native libraries for Android 16KB page size compatibility.

apps.name: Network Speed Monitor & Firewall
apps.title: Network Speed Monitor & Firewall
apps.shortDescription: Monitor internet speed and block unwanted app connections without root.
apps.seoDescription: Network Speed Monitor & Firewall helps Android users monitor real-time traffic, track app network usage and block unwanted connections without root.

apps.name: Minecraft Server: MCPaper
apps.title: Minecraft Server: MCPaper
apps.shortDescription: Run and manage Minecraft Java Edition servers on Android.
apps.seoDescription: Minecraft Server: MCPaper helps Android users run and manage Minecraft Java Edition servers from a phone or tablet.
features: Useful for local testing and small servers

apps.name: Minecraft RCON Admin
apps.title: Minecraft RCON Admin
apps.shortDescription: Remote admin tools for Minecraft Java servers.
apps.seoDescription: Minecraft RCON Admin helps server owners connect to Minecraft Java Edition servers and run RCON commands from Android.
features: Use Android as a server console

apps.name: Bluetooth Keyboard Mouse
apps.title: Bluetooth Keyboard Mouse
apps.shortDescription: Use your Android device as a Bluetooth keyboard and mouse.
apps.seoDescription: Bluetooth Keyboard Mouse turns an Android device into a Bluetooth keyboard and mouse for controlling nearby computers, tablets and compatible devices.
features: Use Android as a Bluetooth keyboard
Use Android as a Bluetooth mouse
